message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>Reports have emerged documenting earlier SARS-CoV-2 cases than previously recognized. To investigate this possibility in the Bay Area, we retrospectively tested 1,700 samples from symptomatic individuals for the last 2 months of 2019. No SARS-CoV-2 positive pools were identified, consistent with limited transmission in this population at this time.</jats:p>
title: Retrospective Pooled Screening for SARS-CoV-2 RNA in late 2019
